senses.definition: an upright lever that can be moved in different directions to control an image or character in a video game

examples.x: He used the joystick to navigate his character through the game.
She found the joystick easy to use, making the game more enjoyable.
The arcade was filled with machines that had bright joysticks for players to use.
He adjusted the joystick to aim at the target in the shooting game.
The game console came with a new joystick that offered better precision.

senses.definition: a handheld input device used to control video games or other interactive media, typically featuring buttons, directional pads, analog sticks, and other controls that allow players to interact with the game and manipulate on-screen objects or characters

examples.x: I plugged in my gamepad to play the new racing game on my console.
He prefers using a gamepad instead of a keyboard when playing sports games.
The game feels much smoother when I use a gamepad, especially during intense action scenes.
She picked up her gamepad and started playing her favorite fighting game.
I had to replace my old gamepad because the analog stick was no longer working properly.

senses.definition: an electronic input device that is used to control video games
a set of arrow-shaped buttons on a controller used to navigate in video games or other electronic devices

examples.x: I used the directional pad to move my character through the maze in the game.
The controller has a responsive directional pad, making it easier to navigate the menu.

senses.definition: a thumb-operated input device on modern gaming controllers that provides variable and precise movement in multiple directions

examples.x: The analog stick on the game controller makes it easier to navigate the 3D world in the game.
She used the analog stick to steer her character through the obstacle course.
I prefer using the analog stick for movement rather than the directional pad.
The analog stick on the new controller feels much more responsive than the old one.

senses.definition: a handheld input device used in gaming to control movement or perform specific actions in games
an electronic device on which video games can be played

examples.x: The new video game console has amazing graphics and features.
Popular video game consoles include PlayStation, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch.
The video game console came with two controllers and a free game.
Some video game consoles also double as streaming devices for movies.

senses.definition: a small, specialized gaming device designed to play digital games, often with access to online gaming services

examples.x: The microconsole is perfect for anyone looking for an affordable way to play games on their TV.
I bought a microconsole to play some indie games, and it's been a fun experience so far.
Since microconsoles rely on streaming and downloads, you won’t need to worry about physical discs cluttering your space.
The microconsole I got connects easily to the TV, and it even works with the same controllers I use for my main console.

senses.definition: a portable electronic device designed for playing video games on the go, typically equipped with a screen and gaming controls integrated into the device

examples.x: He always carries his handheld game console with him when he travels.
The kids love playing on their handheld game consoles during road trips.
She took her handheld game console to the park and played for hours.
The handheld game console is perfect for playing games during long commutes.
I used to play my favorite games on a handheld game console when I was younger.

senses.definition: a line of video game consoles developed and produced by Microsoft, known for its advanced gaming capabilities and a vast library of games

examples.x: I spent the whole afternoon playing on my Xbox with friends.
I just got an Xbox gift card and can't wait to buy some new games.
She loves playing adventure games on her Xbox after school.
We connected our Xbox to the TV and had a movie night with streaming apps.
He plays online multiplayer games on his Xbox every weekend.

senses.definition: a light gun controller designed for use with certain video game consoles, such as the PlayStation and PlayStation 2, to enhance shooting and target-based gameplay

examples.x: The GunCon controller was a lot of fun, especially for shooting games, because it let me aim directly at the screen.
Using the GunCon made the game more exciting because I could literally point and shoot like a real gun.
I used the GunCon to play Time Crisis on my PlayStation, and it felt like being in an arcade.
I remember how cool it was when I first tried the GunCon at the arcade, and then I got one for my home console.
The GunCon only worked with certain games, so I had to make sure the game I wanted to play was compatible.

senses.definition: the capability of increasing the storage capacity of a device, such as a gaming console or smartphone, by adding external storage devices such as memory cards or external hard drives

examples.x: I ran out of space on my phone, but luckily it has expandable storage, so I added a microSD card.
The console has expandable storage, so I can keep adding more games as I need them.
The game is too big to fit on my phone, but with expandable storage, I can store it on an SD card.
I like that this tablet supports expandable storage; it makes it easier to save all my movies and apps.

senses.definition: a popular brand of video game consoles developed and manufactured by Sony Interactive Entertainment

examples.x: PlayStation has some of the best exclusive games, like Spider-Man and The Last of Us.
Do you want to come over and play on my PlayStation later?
The new PlayStation console has some incredible graphics, it’s like playing in real life.
I was so excited when PlayStation released that new update for Horizon Forbidden West.

senses.definition: the ability of a newer version of a video game console to play games designed for its previous model or generation

examples.x: The PlayStation 5 has backward compatibility, so I can still play my PlayStation 4 games on it.
Thanks to backward compatibility, you do not need to replace your old games when upgrading to the new console.
I was happy to find that the new software update added backward compatibility with older file formats.
With backward compatibility, I can keep playing my classic games without worrying about compatibility issues.
